issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://az1.zona.pub/?ref=share](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faz1.zona.pub%2F%3Fref%3Dshare) ### Comment > Здравствуйте, после 1 запуска Zona любой фильм или сериал источник спокойно включается, но стоит выйти из него и ещё включить его или любой другой ИСТОЧНИК появляется предупреждение чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы. Приходится принудительно через настройки закрывать Zona и ещё раз открывать и также тоже самое 1 запуск нормально, потом всё также. На компьютере с Zona и adguard таких проблем вообще нет. Менял DNS, он также баннер показывает чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы, либо вообще ничего не открывает. Исправьте ситуацию 🙏 (на скриншотах как смог всё изложил по полочкам). ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for www.awin1.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from www.awin1.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the actual
destination in a URL-encoded `ued=` query parameter, routing users through
Awin's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://www.awin1.com/cread.php?awinmid=15135&awinaffid=169249&clickref=ppr-fr-1893524464&ued=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.e.leclerc%2Fmag%2Fe-leclerc-comboire

Expected destination:
https://www.e.leclerc/mag/e-leclerc-comboire



### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:

```
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=pct|/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.awin1\.com.*[?&]ued=([^&]*).*/\$1/|pct
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. Awin (formerly Affiliate Window) is one of the largest
affiliate networks in Europe and the UK, widely used by deal/coupon sites
(Dealabs, Hotukdeals, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.name: Stale

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.adobe.com/home](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adobe.com%2Fhome)

### Comment
> Could you please remove from your default DNS rules, whether your DNS in IPv4 and IPv6, your DoH, DoT, DoQ and DNSCrypt IPv4 and IPv6 the following one: ||cchome.adobe.io^, as it breaks the webpage https://www.adobe.com/home for Creative Cloud Pro users. Please refer to the screenshot attached to this message to see what happens by enforcing this rule. I hope you'll answer positively to this request because it is really a pain in the neck to have to choose between your DNS filtering rules and the expected display of a website. Hope you'll understand, and remove this.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/izb1murw1qg4g8k888cwc400gwckkkckzeo6varshs.png?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/pu66va7rb28wcwc888ok8sg4gsws4cccwlk6s91acg.png?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Other
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Windows 11, Version 25H2 (build du système d'exploitation 26200.8037)`
Browser: | Firefox

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

to My filters.

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://quasarzone.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fquasarzone.com%2F) ### Comment > quasarzone.com 접속시에 클라우드플레어 오류페이지가 표시됩니다. > DNS보호를 끄거나 HTTPS필터링에서 해당사이트를 제외시엔 정상접속됩니다.(광고차단된자리가 빈공간남아있음) > 추적보호를 꺼보거나 DNS필터를 꺼보거나 고급설정을 초기화해봐도 접속이 안됩니다. > DNS 서버를 바꿔보거나 여러가지 시도해봐도 마찬가지입니다. > 최근 몇일전부터 갑자기 발생한 증상입니다. > 어떤 사람은 되고 어떤 사람은 안된다고합니다. > 제가 할수있는선에선 여러가지를 해봤지만 DNS보호를 끄거나 HTTPS필터링에 예외등록을 했을때만 정상 접속됐습니다. ``` Username: @Keum-KangSeon-LostArkDirectorFan ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1t2o1mhdl1i8kokwsc80gssgc8gs048cqvqrzlsg20.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5xsmyidb9c84ko0k8sowosc08w8444sdr7zcf1hk5w.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.9 (5282) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | TDI Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter

**Security:**
uBlock Origin – Badware risks Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)`,
`List-KR filters list (AdGuard) (url: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@list-kr/filterslists@latest/dist/filterslist-AdGuard.txt)`,
`애드가드 갤러리 필터 (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hooray804/adguard-gallery-filter/refs/heads/main/filter.txt)` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h),
Disable cache for third-party requests

**Browser API**:
Block Push API,
Block Location API,
Block Flash,
Block Java

**Windows Tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID,
Disable Windows Defender automatic samples submission,
Disable WAP Push Message Routing Service,
Disable Windows Recall

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests,
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `quic://unfiltered.adguard-dns.com`
filters: `User rules (url: none)`, `Dan Pollock's List (url: https://adguardteam.github.io/HostlistsRegistry/assets/filter_4.txt)`, `애드가드 갤러리 DNS 필터 (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hooray804/adguard-gallery-filter/refs/heads/main/DNS.txt)`, `AdGuard DNS filter (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AdguardTeam/FiltersRegistry/master/filters/filter_15_DnsFilter/filter.txt)`, `KOR: List-KR DNS (url: https://adguardteam.github.io/HostlistsRegistry/assets/filter_25.txt)` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `로아인벤 UI에러 해결`
`AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)`
`Gallery Extension for FMKOREA (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hooray804/adguard-gallery-filter/refs/heads/main/Gallery Extension.user.js)`
`NamuLink (url: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/namulink@latest/dist/NamuLink.user.js)`
`Pure Text Copy (url: https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/534818/Pure Text Copy.user.js)`
`tinyShield (url: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js)`
`Use YouTube AV1 (url: https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/466127/Use YouTube AV1.user.js)`

`YouTube JS Engine Tamer (url: https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/473972/YouTube JS Engine Tamer.user.js)`
`YT-DVR (url: https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/562121/YT-DVR.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `카스퍼스키` ### Issue configuration issue.title: Modify the rules for digidip.net using the corelibs 1.20 pct feature
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Hello,

Now that we can optimize the rules using `$urltransform` with `pct`, I propose replacing the current rules with a single one.

To clean the URLs for digidip.net, there are currently 4 rules in the AdGuard Tracking Protection filter:

```text
||digidip.net/visit?url=$urltransform=/%3A/:/
||digidip.net/visit?url=$urltransform=/%3D/=/
||digidip.net/visit?url=$urltransform=/%3F/?/
||digidip.net/visit?url=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.digidip\.net.*url=([^&]*).*/\$1/
```

### Proposed solution

Thanks to the new `pct` modifier, we can combine them into a single rule:

`||digidip.net/visit?url=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.digidip\.net.*url=([^&]*)/\$1/|pct`

Thank you,

### Additional information

_No response_

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://apps.apple.com/hk/app/%E7%99%BE%E5%BA%A6%E8%B4%B4%E5%90%A7-%E8%81%8A%E5%85%B4%E8%B6%A3-%E4%B8%8A%E8%B4%B4%E5%90%A7/id477927812](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapps.apple.com%2Fhk%2Fapp%2F%25E7%2599%25BE%25E5%25BA%25A6%25E8%25B4%25B4%25E5%2590%25A7-%25E8%2581%258A%25E5%2585%25B4%25E8%25B6%25A3-%25E4%25B8%258A%25E8%25B4%25B4%25E5%2590%25A7%2Fid477927812)

### Comment
> When launching the Baidu Tieba app, there is a splash screen ad; however, because AdGuard DNS blocks the ad, the app displays a blank white screen and fails to load. This appears to be caused by an issue with the AdGuard DNS blocking rules.



### Screenshots

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
> @Alex-302 _Мне уже самому неловко, что продолжаю развивать эту тему_ 😅, _но…_ # 1. ### Добавление правил https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/3b0b915e1d2e634c6956418ba7c71abc21c7dd9a не исправило ситуацию. Реклама продолжает появляться в выдаче с классом `RsyaOrganic`. **Пример поискового запроса:** https://yandex.ru/search/?text=можно+ли+подать+на+развод+через+госуслуги&lr=213
Мобильный Chrome [📎 DOM](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29930123/DOM.yandex.ru.android.html)
# 2. ### Также обнаружилась реклама с ярлыком «промо» на `ya.ru`, которая появляется в настольной версии аж в двух вариантах. [DOM ya.ru promo_V1.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29930642/DOM.ya.ru.promo_V1.html)
Скрин
[DOM ya.ru promo_V2.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29930643/DOM.ya.ru.promo_V2.html) (Тут ещё и прямая реклама `Rsya` в выдаче вылезла)
Скрин
# 3. ### В предложениях поисковой строки, на странице, тоже появляется реклама ~~(кто бы мог подумать)~~. Характерно как для `ya.ru`, так и для `yandex.ru`. [DOM ya.ru search.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29930942/DOM.ya.ru.search.html) [DOM ya.ru search hover.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29930997/DOM.ya.ru.search.hover.html)
Скрин
## P.S.
Тестовая страница AdGuard (на всякий) #### Yandex #### Chrome

comment.body:
### Из интересного:
Сейчас проверил с [RU AdList](https://forums.lanik.us/viewtopic.php?t=22512-о-фильтре-ru-adlist-и-дополнениях) и все проблемы исчезли!

**RU AdList** — https://easylist-downloads.adblockplus.org/advblock.txt
**RU AdList JS Fixes** — https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/19993/RU%20AdList%20JS%20Fixes.user.js
**RU AdList CSS Fixes** — https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easylist/ruadlist/master/ruadlist-fixes.user.css

Как мне кажется, основную роль сыграл `JS Fixes` (или если без JS `CSS Fixes`) Посмотрите, какие решения применила их команда.

---
Я ведь правильно понимаю, что основная проблема в том, что Яндекс активно использует обфускацию классов (типа `jqjakw97Ce8gL`, хэшированные/рандомные классы) и React-обёртки? Реклама может подгружаться динамически после инициализации страницы через JS.
